title: Ornithopteris makrinii

taxonomy: Ornithopteris makrinii is classified as a genus of extinct ferns within the family Matoniaaceae. More specifically, it belongs to the order Matoniales. As a member of the class Polypodiopsida, Ornithopteris makrinii is closely related to other extinct ferns and living ferns. The family Matoniaaceae is part of the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and fern allies. Ornithopteris makrinii is also classified as a member of the kingdom Plantae.
uses: Ornithopteris makrinii, a species of ancient plant, has been studied for its potential medicinal properties.
